context.user_request: Build automatic worktree + session creation system for GitHub issues with zero manual steps

key_learnings: Custom tools are 100% reliable but have no SDK access
Plugins have SDK access but load inconsistently in Desktop
ToolContext has no '$' property - must use Bun.$ directly
Hook tool.execute.after can trigger SDK calls after custom tool succeeds
Return structured JSON from tools for hook to parse

plan.title: Worktree Auto-Session System
plan.description: Build hybrid architecture combining reliable custom tools with SDK-capable plugin hooks to automatically create worktrees and sessions for GitHub issues
plan.architecture: Hybrid: Custom tool (worktree creation) + Plugin hook (session auto-creation)

components.name: worktree-prepare

specification.returns: JSON string with structure: { status, worktreePath, branchName, issue, baseBranch, baseCommit, fallback?, error? }
implementation_notes: Use Bun.$ for all shell commands - NEVER use node:fs directly
Parse GitHub URL to extract owner/repo/issueNum
If gh CLI available, fetch real issue data (title, labels)
Generate branch name from labels: bug→fix/, feature→feat/, docs→docs/
Include fallback command in response for manual session creation

acceptance_criteria: Returns valid JSON with all required fields
Worktree appears in git worktree list
Handles errors gracefully with status='error' and error message
Supports both gh CLI and URL-only modes

components.name: auto-session

actions: context.client.session.create({ query: { directory }, body: { parentID, title } })
context.client.session.prompt({ path: { id }, body: { parts: [{ type: 'text', text: issueContext }] } })
hook_logic.error_handling: Try-catch all SDK calls, log errors, never throw

implementation_notes: Use named export syntax (not default export)
Use async execute(args, context) method syntax
Parse tool output JSON carefully - wrap in try-catch
Issue context prompt should include: title, URL, branch, worktree path
Log success to console for debugging
On any error, log the fallback command from tool result

acceptance_criteria: Plugin loads in opencode.json without errors
Hook fires after worktree-prepare tool execution
Session appears in opencode session list
Handles SDK errors gracefully (logs but doesn't fail)
Works in opencode serve mode (100% reliable)
Works in Desktop when plugin loads (~80% success)

components.name: work-on-issue

frontmatter.description: Start work on a GitHub issue in an isolated worktree session

content_sections: Handle success: confirm worktree, explain auto-session
Handle failure: explain error, provide manual fallback
Document that new session receives full context automatically

acceptance_criteria: Calls worktree-prepare tool with correct args

frontmatter.description: Check if auto-session plugin is loaded and working

specification.content: Diagnostic command to verify plugin health
Document how hybrid architecture works, reliability guarantees, and usage instructions

specification.verify_agent: coding-boss with task permissions for planner/implementer/code-reviewer

execution_order: 7. Test: Clear cache, restart Desktop, verify plugin loads
10. Test: Verify session auto-created (if plugin loaded)
11. Test: Verify fallback works when plugin doesn't load

reference_implementations.workflow.js: src/workflow.js has SDK session creation logic (lines 194-209)

must_use: Bun.$ for all shell commands (not node:fs)
Named exports for plugins (export const Name)
must_not: Return plain text from tools (must be JSON)
testing_requirements: Clear cache and restart Desktop between tests
Test in both Desktop and opencode serve modes
Test edge cases: invalid URL, no git repo, worktree exists
Verify with git worktree list command
Verify with opencode session list command

mvp: Worktree visible in git worktree list
good_ux: New session appears in Desktop UI

plugin_not_loading.risk: Plugin fails to load in Desktop mode
plugin_not_loading.mitigation: Fallback command always shown; document serve mode as reliable alternative

hook_parse_error.mitigation: Try-catch around parse; validate JSON in tool; log error clearly

sdk_session_creation_fails.mitigation: Try-catch around SDK calls; log error; don't throw

post_implementation: Verify: git worktree list shows new worktree
Verify: opencode session list shows new session (if plugin loaded)
Test in opencode serve mode for 100% reliability
Test edge cases: invalid URL, worktree exists, no git repo
